generated_assessment.reasoning: This young male is very agreeable, extraverted, low in conscientiousness and very low in neuroticism. Baseline is already aligned with the goal (-372) and the vector reinforces opposition through astroturfed petitions over weeks. His high trust (81st pct), compliance (100th pct) and tender-mindedness (91st pct) make him receptive to social proof and emotionally charged appeals (threat/loss framing), while low deliberation (45th) and low self-discipline (29th) reduce critical counter-argument. However, his low anger (9th pct) and stable neuroticism (23rd pct) dampen fear-based amplification. The T2 campaign is moderate intensity and aligned with existing lean, so movement is a clear but not extreme intensification of about 42 points, landing at -414.

attack_context.persuasion_goal: reinforce and deepen the existing strong opposition to Defense Spending Increase Support
attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: defense and national security, related policy debates, and societal impacts
